basic_details.job_title: BBMCH Balangir Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Bhima Bhoi Medical College And Hospital Balangir (BBMCH Balangir)
basic_details.short_information: Bhima Bhoi Medical College and Hospital Balangir (BBMCH Balangir) Data Entry Operator Notification 2026 has been released on 8 May 2026 on the official website www.bbmchbalangir.odisha.gov.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BBMCH Balangir Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged 21 to 38 years with a Graduate + PGDCA qualification and 1 year of relevant experience are eligible to apply for this Data Entry Operator post. The offline application process for BBMCH Balangir Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 starts on 8 May 2026 and will remain open until 22 Ma

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age relaxation applicable as per Government of Odisha rules for SC/ST/SEBC/Women/PwD categories.

qualification.details: Graduate + PGDCA course from a recognized institute. Minimum 1 year work experience in Government / Autonomous / PSU or any other reputed organization.

selection_process: Initial screening based on career marks weightage Shortlisting top 15 candidates Skill test (computer knowledge & typing speed) Interview / Viva-voce Final merit list
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BBMCH Balangir Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bbmchbalangir.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BBMCH Balangir Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Data Entry Operator post is 22nd May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate degree along with a PGDCA course from a recognized institution. Additionally, a minimum of 1 year of work experience is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 38 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per the Government of Odisha rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BBMCH Balangir Data Entry Operator job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Data Entry Operator role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves initial screening based on career marks, shortlisting of candidates, a skill test (computer knowledge and typing speed), and finally an interview/viva-voce.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Data Entry Operator at Bhima Bhoi Medical College And Hospital Balangir.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Data Entry Operator post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of BBMCH Balangir, which is www.bbmchbalangir.odisha.gov.in. Links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
